Dallas @ Los Angeles Picks & Props

Picks Consensus Projections Trends Top User Picks

DAL vs LAL Picks

NBA Picks
Spread
LAL -7.0 (-110)
Best Odds
-6.5 -105
Pick made: 6 hours ago
Douglas Farmer
Betting Analyst
-6.5  -105
-6.5  -105
-6.5  -106
-6.5  -105
-6.5  -110

The Los Angeles Lakers have covered the spread in their last three games against the Dallas Mavericks. Continuing this will not tie to Luka Doncic at all, sidelined with a hamstring worry, but Cooper Flagg’s absence looms even larger, robbing Dallas of its best and sometimes only offenisve option.

Read Full Analysis
Points Scored
LeBron James o22.5 Points Scored (-112)
Best Odds
o23.5 -120
Pick made: 9 hours ago
Jon Metler
Betting Analyst
o24.5  -109
o24.5  -110
o24.5  -106
o23.5  -120
o24.5  -129

With Luka Dončić sidelined, LeBron James has every opportunity to put on a show against the Dallas Mavericks. His points prop is sitting at -112 for the over 22.5, and that’s a number worth attacking given that I price it much closer to -175. Daniel Gafford provides solid rim protection, but he’s typically limited to around 20 minutes per game. During the stretches when he’s off the floor, Dallas lacks a true back-line defender who can consistently disrupt LeBron’s downhill attacks. The Mavericks also struggle with communication and transition defense. Even at this stage of his career, LeBron remains elite at running the floor and capitalizing on early scoring opportunities. With his basketball IQ and ability to exploit defensive lapses, he should be able to pick apart this version of the Mavericks’ defense.

The Dallas Mavericks rank as the 5th-worst offensive rebounding offense in the NBA over the last 5 games without the home court advantage (offensive rebounds maintain possession, and a lack of them may therefore eliminate further chances for scoring and assists).. Over the last 15 games, opposing starting SFs have attempted 1.9 foul shots per game (fewest in the NBA) against the Lakers, struggling to get to the charity stripe.

DAL vs LAL Props

GAME & PLAYER PROPS PROJECTIONS ANALYSIS BEST ODDS
SPREAD
LAL -6.5 spread
-7.3 PROJECTION

-6.5 -105

-6.5  -105
-6.5  -106
-6.5  -105
-6.5  -110
LAL -6.5 spread

PROJECTION

-7.3 PROJECTION
-0.8 DIFFERENCE
0.84% EV

ANALYSIS

The Dallas Mavericks are set to face off against the Los Angeles Lakers on February 12, 2026, at 10:00 PM ET, with the matchup taking place at Crypto.com Arena. Currently, the Mavericks hold a record of 19-34, while the Lakers stand at 32-21, making the Lakers clear favorites at home with a spread of -6.5.. Recent form indicates a stark contrast between the two teams. The Lakers have been playing solid basketball, winning 30 of their last 50 contests. In their most recent outing, however, the Lakers suffered a disappointing loss to the San Antonio Spurs, falling 136-108. Conversely, the Mavericks enter this game struggling mightily, having lost eight consecutive games, including a recent defeat against the Phoenix Suns, where they lost 120-111.. Betting odds reflect the disparity in performance, with the Lakers holding an implied win probability of 69%, while the Mavericks sit at a mere 31%. The Moneyline for the Lakers is set at -250, and for the Mavericks, it stands at +210.. For those looking to wager on player props, Austin Reaves’s Points and Assists market has garnered significant attention, with the prop total opening at Over 27.5 and moving to Over 31.5, indicating sharp bettors are leaning toward the over on Reaves’s performance.. As the Mavericks look to snap their losing streak, they will need to elevate their game against a Lakers squad that has shown resilience and potential to capitalize on home-court advantage. The matchup promises intrigue for both fans and bettors alike.

-6.5 -105

The Dallas Mavericks are set to face off against the Los Angeles Lakers on February 12, 2026, at 10:00 PM ET, with the matchup taking place at Crypto.com Arena. Currently, the Mavericks hold a record of 19-34, while the Lakers stand at 32-21, making the Lakers clear favorites at home with a spread of -6.5.. Recent form indicates a stark contrast between the two teams. The Lakers have been playing solid basketball, winning 30 of their last 50 contests. In their most recent outing, however, the Lakers suffered a disappointing loss to the San Antonio Spurs, falling 136-108. Conversely, the Mavericks enter this game struggling mightily, having lost eight consecutive games, including a recent defeat against the Phoenix Suns, where they lost 120-111.. Betting odds reflect the disparity in performance, with the Lakers holding an implied win probability of 69%, while the Mavericks sit at a mere 31%. The Moneyline for the Lakers is set at -250, and for the Mavericks, it stands at +210.. For those looking to wager on player props, Austin Reaves’s Points and Assists market has garnered significant attention, with the prop total opening at Over 27.5 and moving to Over 31.5, indicating sharp bettors are leaning toward the over on Reaves’s performance.. As the Mavericks look to snap their losing streak, they will need to elevate their game against a Lakers squad that has shown resilience and potential to capitalize on home-court advantage. The matchup promises intrigue for both fans and bettors alike.

-6.5 -105
TOTAL
Under 237.5 Total

-6.0 DIFFERENCE
18.23% EV

How is Value calculated?

Our value pickas are based on the Expected Value (EV) of placing the bet, using our projections and the current odds price:

⭐ 0-2 Stars: Negative to Even EV ️

⭐ 3-4 Stars: Positive EV ️

⭐ 5 Stars: Highest EV ️
